name: DrawingCoordinateConverter
summary: The DrawingCoordinateConverter class is used to move coordinates from one view to another. This tool takes into account the empty areas in the views.

constructors.name: DrawingCoordinateConverter
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DrawingCoordinateConverter class

methods.name: Convert(ViewBase, ViewBase, PointList)
methods.signature: public static PointList Convert(ViewBase fromView, ViewBase toView, PointList pointList)
methods.summary: Converts a list of coordinate points from one view's coordinate system to another view's coordinate system.

params.name: pointList
params.doc: The list of points to be converted.

methods.name: Convert(ViewBase, ViewBase, Point)
methods.signature: public static Point Convert(ViewBase fromView, ViewBase toView, Point point)
methods.summary: Converts one coordinate point from one view's coordinate system to another view's coordinate system.
